sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SolarEdge starts shipping US-made residential inverters to Europe
feed.summary: SolarEdge Technologies has begun exporting US-manufactured residential inverter products from its Austin, Texas facility to European markets, including Italy, France, and the Netherlands. These shipments, which started in late 2025, utilize a "single SKU" design to simplify inventory for installers. The company also anticipates commencing shipments of commercial and industrial PV products from its Florida facility in early 2026.

feed.title: European gas operator places $150,000 follow-on order with Actelis
feed.summary: Actelis Networks (NASDAQ:ASNS) has secured a $150,000 follow-on order from a major European natural gas transmission system operator, following an initial deployment in October 2023. This order highlights the growing demand for Actelis's cyber-hardened networking solutions in critical energy infrastructure, despite the company's recent financial challenges and stock price decline. The company has also recently completed orders for the FAA and a major U.S. telecom carrier, and announced a public offering to raise $5 million.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Receives Reiterated 'Buy' Rating from B of A Securities | GD Stock News
feed.summary: B of A Securities has reiterated its 'Buy' rating for General Dynamics (GD) with a maintained price target of $400.00 USD, a decision made by analyst Ronald Epstein on January 30, 2026. This follows several neutral ratings from other analysts with slight price target adjustments earlier in January and December 2025. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $391.49 for GD, implying an 11.87% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value (GF Value) of $335.29, suggesting a 4.19% downside.

feed.title: Canadian Solar's CSI Solar unit expects up to 60% profit drop in 2025
feed.summary: Canadian Solar's CSI Solar unit anticipates a significant profit decrease of up to 60% in 2025. This article, published on January 30, 2026, highlights financial projections for the solar sector, specifically focusing on a major player's expected performance. The report indicates potential challenges ahead for the company's profitability.

feed.title: Analysts’ Opinions Are Mixed on These Consumer Cyclical Stocks: Birkenstock Holding plc (BIRK), Tesla (TSLA) and Amazon (AMZN)
feed.summary: This article summarizes analyst opinions on three consumer cyclical stocks: Birkenstock Holding plc (BIRK), Tesla (TSLA), and Amazon (AMZN). Birkenstock has a "Strong Buy" consensus with a 45.8% upside, while Tesla has a "Hold" consensus with a 7.5% downside. Amazon maintains a "Strong Buy" rating with a 19.9% upside.

feed.title: Moderna Teams With Recordati on Rare Disease mRNA Therapy for up to $160M
feed.summary: Moderna has partnered with Italy's Recordati in a deal worth up to $160 million to develop mRNA-3927, an mRNA therapy for the rare metabolic disorder propionic acidemia (PA). Moderna will maintain control over clinical development and manufacturing, while Recordati will handle commercialization, including an upfront payment of $50 million and potential milestone payments. This collaboration comes as Moderna faces financial pressures, aiming for profitability by 2028 amidst declining COVID-19 vaccine sales.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Faces Otway JV Funding Default And Partnership Test
feed.summary: 3D Energi has defaulted on its funding obligations for the Otway Basin exploration campaign, led by ConocoPhillips, leading to a trading halt for 3D Energi. This situation introduces uncertainty for ConocoPhillips regarding project timing, partnership structure, and funding adjustments. The market is now looking to see how ConocoPhillips will manage the default and what it means for future joint venture activities.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) Is Largely Controlled by Institutional Shareholders Who Own 80% of the Company
feed.summary: Institutional shareholders own 80% of Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY), making their trading decisions significant for the stock's performance. The Vanguard Group, BlackRock, Inc., and State Street Global Advisors, Inc. are among the largest shareholders, with the top 24 collectively owning 50% of the company. Insiders hold less than 1% of the company's shares.

feed.title: WEC Energy Chair Shift And Nuclear Plans Reshape Long Term Outlook
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) has announced the retirement of chairman Gale Klappa, with current CEO Scott Lauber taking on the additional role of chairman. Concurrently, the company is exploring new nuclear power generation opportunities at the Kewaunee site, which could significantly impact its long-term investment strategy and risk profile. Investors are advised to monitor governance around Lauber's expanded role, nuclear development milestones, and future dividend decisions as these changes unfold.

feed.title: Honeywell’s Margin Expansion Play: What the Bears Are Missing
feed.summary: Honeywell (HON) stock rose by 5% despite missing revenue targets, driven by strong profitability, accelerated aerospace spin-off plans, and a record backlog exceeding $37 billion. The article highlights that adjusted operating margins expanded, contrasting with GAAP figures impacted by one-time expenses, and suggests the 50-90 basis-point operating margin expansion guidance for 2026 is achievable, implying further upside for the stock. Investors are encouraged to focus on underlying fundamentals and strategic direction over headline revenue misses.

feed.title: A Look At Alpha Metallurgical Resources (AMR) Valuation After Downgrade And Rolling Thunder Mine Fatality
feed.summary: Alpha Metallurgical Resources (AMR) is facing scrutiny after a rating downgrade from Texas Capital Securities and a fatal incident at its Rolling Thunder Mine. Despite a significant 5-year total shareholder return, the stock's current price of $221.06 is considered overvalued by one narrative with a fair value of $184.50, while the SWS DCF model suggests an intrinsic value of about $463.45 per share.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor (DECK) PT Raised to $160 at Williams Trading
feed.summary: Williams Trading analyst Sam Poser has increased the price target for Deckers Outdoor (NYSE: DECK) to $160.00 from $135.00. The analyst is maintaining their rating on the stock. This article provides this critical analyst update for investors interested in DECK.

feed.title: Amgen Ends Kyowa Kirin Collaboration in Strategic Shift
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. and Kyowa Kirin Co., Ltd. have agreed to terminate their 2021 License and Collaboration Agreement, effective upon regulatory approval. This decision marks a strategic shift for Amgen regarding its partnership and pipeline approach, potentially impacting how the company manages assets previously under the collaboration. Despite a "Buy" rating and a $400.00 price target from an analyst, and an "Outperform" assessment from Spark's AI Analyst, Amgen faces risks due to a high P/E ratio and debt levels.

feed.title: McKesson Completes Divestiture of Norwegian Operations
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation announced the completion of the divestiture of its retail and distribution businesses in Norway to NorgesGruppen. This transaction marks the final step in McKesson's exit from European operations, allowing the company to focus on expanding its growth platforms in Oncology, Multispecialty, and Biopharma Services. Further details will be shared on the company's fiscal third-quarter earnings call.

feed.title: Franklin Resources (BEN) Tops Q1 EPS by 15c, Beats on Revenue
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings, with EPS of $0.70, surpassing the analyst estimate of $0.55 by $0.15. The company also beat revenue expectations, bringing in $2.37 billion against a consensus estimate of $1.71 billion. This positive financial performance indicates a successful first quarter for Franklin Resources.

feed.title: Johnson Controls Named to the Fortune World's Most Admired Companies 2026 List
feed.summary: Johnson Controls has been recognized on Fortune's 2026 list of the World's Most Admired Companies. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to delivering smart, healthy, and sustainable building solutions and its strong operational discipline. The recognition is based on an evaluation by industry peers across nine criteria, including innovation and social responsibility.

feed.title: Franklin Resources pulls in $28B as assets climb to $1.68 trillion
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. announced strong first fiscal quarter results with net income rising to $255.5 million or $0.46 per diluted share. The company achieved $28.0 billion in long-term net inflows, bringing its total Assets Under Management (AUM) to a record $1.68 trillion by December 31, 2025. This growth was driven by positive net flows across equity, multi-asset, and alternative strategies, including significant contributions from alternative investments and its ETF platform.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Doesn't Want to Call the Bottom on Broadcom (AVGO)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed caution about calling a bottom for Broadcom (AVGO) following Intel's earnings, despite the stock being down. Various analysts have reiterated positive ratings and price targets for Broadcom, citing its strong position in the AI industry and addressing investor concerns about competition. The company's shares have seen significant growth over the past year, though they are down year-to-date.

feed.title: Amgen and Kyowa Kirin agree to terminate collaboration agreement
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. and Kyowa Kirin Co., Ltd. have entered into an agreement to terminate their license and collaboration agreement, which was originally signed on June 1, 2021. The termination will take effect upon regulatory approval, but the companies have not disclosed the specific terms of the termination or the reasons behind it, citing confidentiality. This development comes alongside other recent news for Amgen, including an acquisition, a credit rating upgrade, and a new 'Buy' rating from UBS.

feed.title: Notice To Long-Term Shareholders of Molina Healthcare, Inc.
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating claims on behalf of long-term shareholders of Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH) due to alleged breaches of fiduciary duties by certain officers and directors. The investigation stems from an underlying securities fraud class action concerning misrepresentations about the company's "medical cost trend assumptions" and financial guidance for fiscal year 2025. Shareholders who purchased before February 5, 2025, and still hold shares, are encouraged to contact the law office to seek corporate reforms and a return of funds.

feed.title: McKesson completes Norway exit, finalizing European withdrawal
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation has completed the sale of its retail and distribution businesses in Norway to NorgesGruppen, marking its final exit from European operations. This strategic move allows McKesson to focus on growing its Oncology, Multispecialty, and Biopharma Services platforms. Despite a recent earnings miss and target reduction from Jefferies, Morgan Stanley raised its price target, and the company maintains a "GREAT" financial health score, trading below its Fair Value.

feed.title: European gas operator taps Actelis for $150K cyber-hardened upgrade
feed.summary: Actelis Networks received a $150,000 expansion order from a major European natural gas transmission operator for cyber-hardened, rapid-deployment networking equipment. This follow-on order, building on an initial deployment in October 2023, will be used to modernize long-distance pipeline monitoring and security. The solution utilizes Actelis' hybrid fiber-copper technology to provide fiber-grade connectivity over existing infrastructure, enhancing homeland security for critical energy infrastructure.

feed.title: Actelis Networks Receives Significant Expansion Order from Major European Natural Gas Operator, Continuing Critical Infrastructure Modernization
feed.summary: Actelis Networks (NASDAQ: ASNS) has received a significant expansion order of approximately $150,000 from a major European natural gas transmission system operator. This follow-on order, building on an initial deployment in October 2023, validates Actelis' cyber-hardened networking solutions for critical energy infrastructure and supports the operator's modernization and security efforts for its extensive pipeline network. The technology provides fiber-grade connectivity over existing infrastructure, enhancing monitoring and cyber protection against threats targeting essential national security systems.

feed.title: Alpha Metallurgical Resources reports Q4 2025 net loss
feed.summary: Alpha Metallurgical Resources reported a preliminary unaudited net loss of $17.3 million, or $1.34 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025. The metallurgical coal supplier posted Adjusted EBITDA of $28.5 million and total coal sales of 3.8 million tons for the quarter, acknowledging a challenging market environment. The company maintains $524.3 million in liquidity and has continued its share repurchase program.

feed.title: BD Envetec recycle medical plastic waste study
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) and Irish cleantech firm Envetec Sustainable Technologies successfully completed a joint feasibility study demonstrating closed-loop recycling of medical plastics. They transformed regulated healthcare waste, specifically polystyrene Petri dishes, into high-quality manufacturing feedstock using Envetec's Generations technology. This initiative aims to reduce reliance on virgin plastics and promote circular economy solutions for single-use medical devices.

feed.title: Resmed posts Street-beating Q2 results amid increased CPAP demand
feed.summary: Resmed reported strong second-quarter results, exceeding Wall Street expectations with profits of $392.6 million and sales of $1.42 billion, an 11% increase. The company attributed its growth to a high demand for its sleep devices, masks, and accessories, including recent FDA clearance for its Smart Comfort personalized therapy offering. CEO Mick Farrell highlighted the strength and resilience of their global business and ongoing demand for their market-leading sleep and respiratory care devices.

feed.title: Zacks Research Issues Pessimistic Forecast for FANG Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its earnings per share estimates for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) for FY2025, FY2026, and FY2027, citing downward revisions that may pressure the stock. Despite this, the company reported stronger-than-expected Q3 earnings, and analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for FANG, with an average target price of $185.90. Insider trading activity and institutional investor movements show varied sentiment, with a director selling shares while several institutions increased their positions.

feed.title: IBM, Blackstone, Cisco And An Energy Stock: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades" featured several analysts' stock picks. Rob Sechan recommended Blackstone Inc. (BX) due to strong fourth-quarter results. Malcolm Ethridge picked International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) after it beat revenue and earnings estimates, while Jim Lebenthal chose Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) following an analyst upgrade. Joshua Brown's final trade was Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM), which also surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Invests $1.82 Million in Kimco Realty Corporation $KIM
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has made a significant investment in Kimco Realty Corporation, acquiring a new stake of 83,349 shares valued at approximately $1.82 million during the third quarter. This move aligns with other institutional investors who have also adjusted their positions in KIM. Analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Kimco Realty, with an average price target of $23.89.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) CEO Just Doesn’t Miss Quarters, Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) CEO Bill McDermott's consistent performance, noting that he "doesn't miss quarters" despite the stock's recent struggles. The shares have fallen significantly over the past year due to a broader downturn in the enterprise software sector, exacerbated by AI advancements. Analyst firms like BMO Capital, Cantor Fitzgerald, and Jefferies have reiterated positive ratings but cut price targets, citing "multiple compression" yet underscoring limited downside risk for the company.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) CEO Just Doesn’t Miss Quarters, Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted ServiceNow (NOW) and its CEO, Bill McDermott, noting McDermott's consistent performance despite a downturn in the enterprise software sector. NOW's shares have declined significantly, leading BMO Capital, Cantor Fitzgerald, and Jefferies to cut price targets while maintaining cautious optimism. Cramer emphasized McDermott's track record of not missing earnings quarters, framing the stock's current struggles as a challenge for the CEO.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding adjusted sales and EPS expectations, driven by 23% order growth and a record $37 billion backlog. The company announced plans to complete the aerospace spin-off in Q3 2026 and accelerate its focus on innovation and high-growth verticals, projecting 6% to 9% earnings growth and accelerating cash generation for 2026. Management also provided detailed segment outlooks for 2026, including modest margin expansion for aerospace and significant productivity-driven margin growth in industrial automation, while addressing pricing strategies and ongoing portfolio simplification.

feed.title: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Dover Corporation reported strong Q4 2025 results, with organic growth up 5% and adjusted EPS increasing 14% for the quarter and 16% for the full year. The company provided a constructive outlook for 2026, guiding for adjusted EPS of $10.45 to $10.65 per share, representing double-digit growth. Management highlighted robust demand across its portfolio, successful capital allocation strategies including acquisitions and share repurchases, and ongoing productivity initiatives contributing to margin expansion.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Acquires New Holdings in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has initiated a new position in Arista Networks, acquiring 11,705 shares valued at approximately $1.706 million in the third quarter. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, and analysts currently rate ANET as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $164.44. Despite recent insider selling totaling over $27 million, institutional investors collectively own about 82.47% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation announced its Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing expectations with an EPS of $3.82. The company highlighted record refining throughput and ethanol production, emphasizing strong operational performance and a disciplined capital allocation framework including increased dividends and share repurchases. Discussion also covered market dynamics like West Coast refining, Venezuelan crude impacts, and the ongoing policy uncertainties for renewable diesel and ethanol, with Valero poised to benefit from favorable conditions.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) Q2 2026 earnings call transcript
feed.summary: This is the Q2 2026 earnings call transcript for Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH). The transcript details the company's financial performance and discusses future outlook as presented during the earnings call. It provides insights into management's perspective on the quarter's results.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation exceeded Q4 2025 earnings expectations with a reported EPS of $3.22 against an expectation of $2.76. The company highlighted strong safety performance, including zero reportable mainline derailments in Q4, and significant productivity gains in 2025, moving 3% more GTMs with 4% fewer employees. Despite a soft demand environment and competitive pressures related to a pending merger, NSC plans to prioritize safety, service, and cost control in 2026, targeting $150 million in cost savings and a capital expenditure of $1.9 billion.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, with adjusted diluted EPS growing by 4.4% for the year, and an outlook for 2026 adjusted diluted EPS between $5.56 and $5.72. The company highlighted strategic progress in its smoke-free portfolio, including FDA authorizations for ON! PLUS products and advancements in international modern oral initiatives. Challenges included the impact of illicit flavored disposable e-vapor products on the market and competitive pricing in the nicotine pouch category.

feed.title: 4,659 Shares in The Home Depot, Inc. $HD Acquired by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired 4,659 shares of The Home Depot (NYSE:HD) in Q3, a stake valued at approximately $1.888 million. This acquisition occurred despite Home Depot missing EPS estimates in its latest quarter, though revenue exceeded expectations. Meanwhile, several Home Depot executives sold shares totaling about $1.75 million in the past three months.

feed.title: Needham raises Stryker stock price target to $454 on strong Q4 results
feed.summary: Needham has increased its price target for Stryker (NYSE:SYK) to $454 from $448, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's strong fourth-quarter 2025 earnings surpassed expectations with 11.0% organic sales growth. Analysts note broad-based strength due to high procedure volumes and new product launches, despite a premium valuation (P/E ratio of 46.36). Other firms like Canaccord Genuity and Citizens also reaffirmed positive ratings following Stryker's strong performance, including an 11.4% year-over-year revenue increase to $7.2 billion.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Has $1.74 Million Stake in Cenovus Energy Inc $CVE
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Cenovus Energy Inc. by 44.2% in the third quarter, selling 81,170 shares and retaining 102,294 shares valued at approximately $1.74 million. Other institutional investors, such as Fiducient Advisors LLC, Avidian Wealth Enterprises LLC, Triasima Portfolio Management Inc., Dynasty Wealth Management LLC, and JCIC Asset Management Inc., either newly acquired or increased their holdings in Cenovus Energy during the same period. Despite this, Cenovus Energy reported strong Q3 EPS of $0.52, surpassing the consensus of $0.40, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $27.00.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Takes $1.69 Million Position in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. $NCLH
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired a new stake of 68,726 shares, valued at approximately $1.69 million, in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. This increases the institutional ownership of NCLH to 69.58%. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, while company insiders purchased 90,029 shares worth about $1.66 million.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Purchases 31,628 Shares of CNA Financial Corporation $CNA
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in CNA Financial Corporation by 362.6%, purchasing an additional 31,628 shares to bring its total holdings to 40,350 shares valued at approximately $1.875 million. This move comes as CNA Financial reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with EPS of $1.50 and revenue of $3.82 billion. The company also recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.46, representing a 3.8% yield.

feed.title: 28,064 Shares in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. $IFF Acquired by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has acquired a new position in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF), purchasing 28,064 shares for approximately $1.727 million in the third quarter. This acquisition comes as IFF reported beating Q3 EPS estimates but saw revenue decline by 7.9% year-over-year. Analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for IFF, with a consensus target price of $86.46, despite the recent stock decline.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Takes $1.84 Million Position in PACCAR Inc. $PCAR
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has acquired an initial stake of 18,720 shares in PACCAR Inc. (NASDAQ:PCAR) valued at approximately $1.84 million during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with other firms like State Street Corp and JPMorgan Chase & Co. also increasing their holdings in PACCAR. The company, a global technology leader in commercial vehicles, recently announced a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $115.92.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Purchases New Stake in CarGurus, Inc. $CARG
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has acquired a new stake of 49,247 shares in CarGurus, Inc. (NASDAQ:CARG), valued at approximately $1.83 million in the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with other large investors also adjusting their positions in the company. CarGurus currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $40.86, despite some recent insider selling activities.

feed.title: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: A. O. Smith Corporation reported Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $0.896 against an anticipated $0.84. The company achieved record full-year EPS of $3.85, driven by profitability improvements in both North American and Rest of World segments, despite challenges in China and the wholesale residential market. They also discussed the acquisition of Leonard Valve and projected 2026 earnings guidance, emphasizing strategic growth through portfolio management, innovation, and operational excellence.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE:DECK) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE: DECK) reported an outstanding Q3 2026 performance, with revenue up 7% to $1.96 billion and diluted EPS at a record $3.33, exceeding expectations. The growth was primarily driven by exceptional global demand for HOKA and UGG brands, which saw revenue increases of 18% and 5% respectively, alongside strong gross margins and effective marketplace management. The company raised its full-year fiscal 2026 outlook, anticipating continued revenue growth and a best-in-class operating margin, fueled by strategic investments and strong brand momentum across both DTC and wholesale channels.

feed.title: Chevron Raises Production To Offset Oil Price Decline, Hikes Dividend
feed.summary: Chevron reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with earnings beating expectations but revenue missing. Despite a drop in earnings due to lower crude oil prices, the company increased its worldwide and U.S. production to record levels, aided by the Hess acquisition and new projects. Chevron also announced a 4% increase in its quarterly dividend, reflecting its strong cash flow and commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE:AMP) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) reported a strong Q4 2025 and full-year 2025, with record revenue, earnings, and EPS, driven by effective strategy and client experience. The company saw significant growth in assets under management, administration, and advisement, reaching new highs, and posted double-digit EPS growth. Ameriprise continues to invest in technology, AI, and product solutions while maintaining a strong balance sheet and returning substantial capital to shareholders.
